case_title: HUTTON TYLER PIERCE AKA KEVIN GERARD BORKOWSKY VS BOWAN BRUCE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-07-1993, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JUN-14-1993 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FROM BRUCE R BOWEN SEND TO JUDGE COLBERT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUTTON TYLER PIERCE AKA KEVIN GERARD BORKOWSKY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOWAN BRUCE $1,175.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,175.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BOWAN BRUCE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT HUTTON TYLER PIERCE AKA KEVIN GERARD BORKOWSKY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BOWAN BRUCE
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,680.00 FILED BY BOWAN BRUCE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT HUTTON TYLER PIERCE AKA KEVIN GERARD BORKOWSKY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-14-1993 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HUTTON TYLER PIERCE AKA KEVIN GERARD BORKOWSKY AS TO DEFENDANT BOWAN BRUCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-03-1993 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-07-1993 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 00 TRIAL OF MAY-03-1993 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
